case_title: JAIR, JACK et al vs. SANTIAGO, AUGUSTINA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAIR, JACK JAIR, ROSEMARIE SERVED FEB-16-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, AUGUSTINA
